items.title: Github Integrates AI to Improve Accessibility Issue Management and Automate Feedback Triage
items.summaryShort: Github Integrates AI to Improve Accessibility Issue Management and Automate Feedback Triage. GitHub has launched a continuous AI-powered workflow to manage accessibility feedback at scale.

items.title: Axios npm Package Compromised in Supply Chain Attack
items.summaryShort: Axios npm Package Compromised in Supply Chain Attack. On March 31, 2026, two versions of the Axios library were compromised and found to contain a Remote Access Trojan.

items.title: Helidon 4.4.0 Introduces Alignment with OpenJDK Cadence and Support via Java Verified Portfolio

items.title: How to Handle Trusts and Psychological Safety When Scaling Organizations
items.summaryShort: How to Handle Trusts and Psychological Safety When Scaling Organizations. As organizations scale, communication overload, loss of shared context, and trust gaps emerge, Charlotte de Jong Schouwenburg mentioned.

items.title: GitHub Will Use Copilot Interaction Data from Free, Pro, and Pro+ Users to Train AI Models
items.summaryShort: GitHub Will Use Copilot Interaction Data from Free, Pro, and Pro+ Users to Train AI Models. GitHub will use Copilot interaction data from Free, Pro, and Pro+ users to train AI models starting April 24, opting in by default.

items.title: Amazon hits sellers with ‘fuel surcharge' as Iran war roils global energy markets
items.summaryShort: Amazon hits sellers with ‘fuel surcharge' as Iran war roils global energy markets. The e-commerce giant called the surcharge "temporary" but couldn't give a date for when the policy would be retired.

items.title: Artemis II is NASA’s last moon mission without Silicon Valley
items.summaryShort: Artemis II is NASA’s last moon mission without Silicon Valley. Next time around, the pressure will be on SpaceX and Blue Origin.
